home.title: Discover Music with AI
home.subtitle: Identify songs or describe your mood and our AI will recommend the perfect music for you.
home.errorGenerating: Error generating recommendations. Please try again.

audioId.title: Audio Identification
audioId.description: Record any song you hear and we'll identify it instantly

moodBased.title: Mood-Based Recommendations
moodBased.description: Describe how you're feeling and our AI will find the perfect music

learns.title: Learns From You
learns.description: Register and the system will learn your tastes for better suggestions

audioRecorder.title: Identify Song
audioRecorder.subtitle: Record a snippet of the song you're listening to
audioRecorder.couldNotIdentify: Could not identify the song. Try with a longer or clearer audio sample.
audioRecorder.errorProcessing: Error processing audio. Please try again.
audioRecorder.microphoneError: Could not access microphone. Please allow access and try again.

tips.title: Tips
tips.tip1: Bring your device closer to the sound source
tips.tip2: Record at least 10 seconds for better results

moodSelector.title: Describe Your Mood
moodSelector.subtitle: Tell us how you're feeling and we'll recommend the perfect music
moodSelector.andDescribeMood: and describe your mood for better results
moodSelector.orAddDescription: Or add a description below for more specific results
moodSelector.placeholder: E.g., Indie alternative music with summer vibes...
moodSelector.placeholderWithSong: Add a mood description for better results...

examples.title: Example descriptions:
examples.ex2: Smooth jazz for a romantic dinner
examples.ex3: Electronic music for a night drive

audio.title: Reference song
audio.dropzone: Click or drop an audio file here
audio.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Please upload an audio file.
audio.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
audio.couldNotIdentify: Could not identify the song. Try with a different audio file.
audio.errorProcessing: Error processing audio. Please try again.
audio.describeVibeInstead: No worries! Describe the vibe or mood of what you heard and we'll find similar music.
audio.submitWithSongOnly: Press send to get recommendations based on this song
audio.attachHint: Use the microphone to dictate or identify a song
audio.addMoodForBetter: Describe your mood for more personalized recommendations

recording.speakNow: Speak now... your words will appear in the text field
recording.playMusic: Play the song near your microphone...
recording.speechNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser
recording.microphoneError: Could not access microphone. Please allow access and try again.

recommendations.title: Recommendations for you
recommendations.basedOnCombined: your mood and the reference song
recommendations.generatingSubtitle: Our AI is analyzing {type} to find the best recommendations
recommendations.createAccountBanner: Create an account so the system can learn your tastes and give you better suggestions.

auth.signInAccess: Sign in to access your preferences
auth.registerSave: Register to save your music tastes
auth.name: Name
auth.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.guestDisclaimer: Guests can use all features, but their preferences are not permanently saved.

profile.preferencesDescription: The system learns from your likes and dislikes to personalize recommendations. The more you use the app, the better the suggestions will be. Your preferences are stored securely and only used to improve your experience.
profile.likedSongsDescription: Songs you've liked influence future recommendations
profile.dislikedSongsDescription: These songs will never appear in your recommendations
profile.noLikedSongs: No liked songs yet. Like songs to save them here.
profile.noDislikedSongs: No blocked songs. Dislike songs to hide them from recommendations.

player.noVideo: No video available for this song
